flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Monroe County Community College fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.4k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Monroe County Community College rose 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($11.1k → $12.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Monroe County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Monroe County Community College rose 79% between 2006 and 2009 (18.5% → 33.2%).
